notes: Completes the active milkcap identification and spore-print normalization batch across eight records.
Narrows the broad edible milkcap record to the volemus-hygrophoroides group so it cannot be read as a general edible authorization for milkcaps.
Adds filter-ready latex behavior, gill spacing and attachment, cap surface, stem, flesh, host-tree, staining, odor, and spore-print fields while leaving image exposure unchanged.
